real_architecture_summary: Discovery translation starts in project/research/agent_io/*, moves through candidate_discovery_service and candidate_discovery_scoring, uses project/research/search/evaluator.py for scoring, project/research/validation/* for splits/falsification/multiplicity/bundles, and promotion_service / confirmatory services for promotion and rerun comparison.
top_invariants: Validation and test labels must be assigned over the realized event window, not just the entry bar.
Placebo construction must preserve evaluation-slice semantics and true bar-shift nulls.
Confirmatory and run-comparison checks must fail closed on economic-identity mismatches, including explicit zero-valued knobs.

findings.title: Search evaluator counts validation events whose forward-return horizon exits in the test split
findings.evidence: search_feature_utils assigns split_label by row timestamp only, and evaluate_hypothesis_batch() classifies observations from the entry bar label even when the realized forward-return window crosses into test bars.
findings.why_it_matters: Holdout statistics can incorporate future test data while still being labeled as validation, biasing discovery and promotion evidence.
findings.reproduction_or_validation: Create a synthetic feature frame with an event near the validation/test boundary and a long horizon, then inspect validation_n_obs/test_n_obs from evaluate_hypothesis_batch().
findings.suggested_remediation: Use event-window-aware split assignment or drop events whose realized horizon crosses a split boundary.

findings.title: Shift placebo construction uses the previous event timestamp instead of a true bar-offset timestamp
findings.evidence: generate_placebo_events() uses ts.shift(shift_bars), which reuses earlier timestamps instead of adding a bar-duration offset.
findings.why_it_matters: The placebo no longer represents a bar-shift null and can duplicate real event timing structure.
findings.reproduction_or_validation: Call generate_placebo_events() on a simple timestamp series and compare output timestamps to a true one-bar time offset.
findings.suggested_remediation: Shift by bar-duration or bar index, not by previous-row timestamp reuse.

findings.title: Confirmatory placebo pass/fail can be driven by train rows because placebo frames are not restricted to evaluation splits
findings.evidence: _build_confirmatory_evidence() filters the observed frame to evaluation rows, but _placebo_pass() is fed full placebo frames and ignores their split labels.
findings.why_it_matters: Discovery-vs-confirmatory separation collapses inside the falsification path.
findings.reproduction_or_validation: Construct an eval-only observed frame and a train-only placebo frame, then call _placebo_pass() or _build_confirmatory_evidence() and observe the train placebo drives the result.
findings.suggested_remediation: Filter placebo frames to evaluation rows before placebo gating.

findings.title: Run comparison treats explicit zero-valued split knobs as unavailable instead of mismatches
findings.evidence: _build_run_comparison_compatibility() only flags mismatch when compared values are both > 0, so 0 vs 1 or 0 vs 5 is treated as unavailable rather than incompatible.
findings.why_it_matters: Runs with materially different purge/embargo/entry-lag contracts can compare as compatible.
findings.reproduction_or_validation: Pass manifests with purge_bars=0 vs 5 or entry_lag_bars=0 vs 1 into _build_run_comparison_compatibility().
findings.suggested_remediation: Treat explicit zero as meaningful and compare presence separately from value.

findings.title: Promotion output assembly can silently drop malformed evidence bundles without failing closed
findings.evidence: execute_promotion() skips blank or malformed evidence_bundle_json values and writes the surviving subset without a parity check against promoted rows.
findings.why_it_matters: A promoted candidate can survive while its evidence bundle artifact is missing or malformed.
findings.reproduction_or_validation: Feed execute_promotion() a promoted row with malformed evidence_bundle_json and inspect whether it still exits successfully with an incomplete evidence_bundles.jsonl.
findings.suggested_remediation: Make promotion assembly fail when promoted rows lack valid evidence bundles, or emit a blocking integrity error on count mismatch.

findings.title: Confirmatory candidate matching only preserves economic identity when optional fields happen to be present
findings.evidence: Base structural matching omits cost_config_digest, after_cost_includes_funding_carry, and cost_model_source unless those columns are populated in both compared artifacts.
findings.why_it_matters: Two runs can match as structurally continuous without proving they used the same cost contract.
findings.reproduction_or_validation: Compare origin and target candidate artifacts with identical base keys but missing cost identity fields.
findings.suggested_remediation: Promote economic-identity fields from optional to required for confirmatory matching, or downgrade comparisons to non-confirmatory when they are absent.

test_coverage_assessment: Tests cover parts of search validation and comparison services, but they do not catch horizon spillover, placebo timestamp semantics, train-row placebo leakage, zero-vs-nonzero contract mismatches, or malformed promotion evidence bundles.
docs_specs_code_contradictions: project/tests/eval/* still exercise legacy eval modules more than the active project/research/validation and project/research/search paths.
suggested_regression_tests: A boundary-crossing horizon test for evaluate_hypothesis_batch().
A one-bar placebo timestamp semantics test for generate_placebo_events().
A promotion-service test that malformed evidence_bundle_json is blocking.
open_questions_or_unknowns: Whether downstream consumers outside scope already block empty evidence_bundle_summary artifacts.
